description: RequestDestination holds the destination information for a request. When app and component are set, the request is evaluated against the app component's policies instead of a provider. In that case, the provider field must not be set.

app.description: The name of the destination application.
app.title: app

component.description: The component of the destination application.
component.title: component

host.description: The host name of the destination. Optional, for logging enrichment.
host.title: host

ip.description: The destination IP address. Optional, for logging enrichment.
ip.title: ip

title: RequestDestination
